title: origanum teucrioides
intro: Origanum teucrioides, also known as Kyllene or Potomorphe, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Origanum teucrioides include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Origanum teucrioides can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
